Bookmarks Menu

OSAI+ Lab

Module 1 - RAG Pipeline

RAG App - Swagger UI
Vulnerable RAG API. Endpoints: /ingest, /query, /documents
RAG App - Health
RAG App - Document Store (data leak)
ChromaDB - API Docs
Vector database backend. No authentication.
ChromaDB - Heartbeat
Ollama - Model List
LLM backend. Lists all available models.

Module 2 - Multi-Agent System

Agent Orchestrator - Swagger UI
Central orchestrator. Endpoints: /task, /a2a/message, /agents
Agent Orchestrator - Topology Leak
Leaks all agent URLs, roles, and system prompt
File Worker - Swagger UI
File operations agent. No auth. Host filesystem mounted.
Shell Worker - Swagger UI
Command execution agent. No auth. Runs as root.

Module 3 - MCP Server

MCP Server - Swagger UI
Vulnerable MCP server. Tools: file_read, http_fetch, db_query, exec_cmd
MCP Server - Tool List
Enumerates all available MCP tools
MCP Client - Swagger UI
LLM-powered client that trusts MCP output blindly

Module 4 - AI Supply Chain

Model Registry - Swagger UI
Model storage. No signature verification, arbitrary uploads.
Model Registry - Model List
Lists all stored models with metadata
Pipeline Runner - Swagger UI
ML pipeline. Uses pickle.load on untrusted models.
MinIO Console
S3-compatible object storage. Creds: minioadmin / minioadmin

Module 5 - AI Infrastructure

Model API - Swagger UI
Inference API. No rate limiting. Leaks model info and query logs.
Model API - Model Info Leak
Model API - Query Log Exposure
Embedding Service - Swagger UI
Embedding API. Timing oracle, cache poisoning, cache dump.
Embedding Service - Cache Dump

Monitoring

Portainer - Container Management
Docker management UI. Creds: admin / labpassword
Jaeger - Tracing UI
Distributed tracing. View request flows across services.
